title: Maxwell Scott
summary: Co-host of the early Operation Lusterkill interviews and organizer of the cancelled ExoContact Sedona conference.
markdown:
**Maxwell Scott** co-hosts the heart of the record's pandemic era: three of the
[James Rink](/lore/james-rink/) interviews of spring 2020, with 73 speaker turns across
them. Rink introduces him as the man *"who will be hosting both Kosol and myself at the
[ExoContact event in Sedona, Arizona](/lore/exocontact-sedona/)"* — the conference the
pandemic would cancel out from under all of them.

His questions carry the practical, testing register of the early interviews: *"I want
people to be able to experience it for themselves. Kosol, are they going to have
experiences?"* — and the sharper follow-up that still hangs over the
[Lusterkill](/lore/operation-lusterkill/) material: *"I had the same question about the
Elite: if they knew everything from the beginning to the end, or if the plan was
hijacked?"*

He also carries community lore of his own — it is Maxwell who relays the
[Chronovisor's](/lore/chronovisor/) quartz-crystal interior, *"from what the AI told me,"*
and the [Jumproom Network's](/lore/secret-space-program/) claim that *"Andy Basiago said
that he was on Mars in 15 minutes."*
